headline: Veralto Acquires Alfaa UV to Expand Ultraviolet Water Treatment Portfolio
summary: Veralto Corporation (NYSE: VLTO) (the "Company"), a global leader in essential water and product quality solutions dedicated to Safeguarding the World's Most Vital Resources™, has expanded its ultraviolet (UV) water treatment capability with the acquisition of Alfaa UV.
